nl_query: Which questions are grouped under the Choice group for attempt rule 1?
failed_sql:
SELECT q.id, q.code, q.max_marks, argq.question_id AS group_member_question_id
FROM   attempt_rule                ar
JOIN   attempt_rule_group          arg  ON arg.attempt_rule_id = ar.id
JOIN   attempt_rule_group_question argq ON argq.group_id       = arg.id
JOIN   question                    q   ON q.id = argq.question_id
WHERE  ar.id = :rule_id
  AND  arg.group_label = 'Choice'
ORDER  BY q.id;
error:
Validation failed (cost): EXPLAIN revealed a SQL error: syntax error at or near ":"
LINE 1: ...estion q ON q.id = argq.question_id WHERE ar.id = :rule_id A...
